title: RadiantNotification [Cobblemon Addon]
description: Never miss a rare spawn! Add chat alerts for Legendary and Shiny Pokémon.
body:
This mod is a simple utility for Cobblemon that alerts you whenever a rare Pokémon appears in your world. Instead of wandering aimlessly, you will receive an instant message in the chat with the exact location.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1932b91c6cf92c677f9bc61efe452307d3dc674.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae830a6b944f2c1d2fade6542de7744405396566.png)
